title: Knysna High trounce Alex
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School (Tuskies) delivered outstanding performances during their sports day on Saturday, facing Alexander Road High School in rugby, hockey and netball.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School (Tuskies) delivered outstanding performances during their sports day on Saturday, facing Alexander Road High School in rugby, hockey and netball."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The day was marked by high-quality matches and excellent sportsmanship from both schools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna High excelled across various games, with their athletes showing exceptional skill and teamwork.","html":"Knysna High excelled across various games, with their athletes showing exceptional skill and teamwork."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event drew strong support from parents, alumni and the local community, creating a festive atmosphere and a strong sense of school pride.","html":"The event drew strong support from parents, alumni and the local community, creating a festive atmosphere and a strong sense of school pride."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Netball results","html":"Netball results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U14 – 21-11 Won","html":"U14 – 21-11 Won"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U15A – 12-11 Won","html":"U15A – 12-11 Won"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U15B – 16-3 Won","html":"U15B – 16-3 Won"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U16A – 6-12 Lost","html":"U16A – 6-12 Lost"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U16B – 7-9 Lost","html":"U16B – 7-9 Lost"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U17 – 8-9 Lost","html":"U17 – 8-9 Lost"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U19B – 9-9 Draw","html":"U19B – 9-9 Draw"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U19A – 32-24 Won","html":"U19A – 32-24 Won"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hockey results","html":"Hockey results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U16 Boys -
